title: Recurring automation to send a notification based on filters
excerpt: I would like to run a recurring automation weekly and notify a person if their item has a certain status (Won) but another column (opportunity ID) is empty.  I am not seeing where you can filter the time/recurrence trigg…

posts.author: BruceB (Bruce Baldwin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to run a recurring automation weekly and notify a person if their item has a certain status (Won) but another column (opportunity ID) is empty. I am not seeing where you can filter the time/recurrence trigger. Is this possible?

Thanks
Bruce

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @BruceB !

Unfortunately conditional timed notifications are still not included in monday’s automations .
